# MuleSoft RPA Manager

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of RPA Manager documentation.
> See [RPA Manager llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-manager/llms-full.txt) for all the RPA Manager documentation in one file.
